---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement you have in mind.

## Motivation

Why would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Approach

Describe how you would implement this (if you have an idea).

**Example ideas:**
- Try a different backbone (ResNet-50, ViT, Xception)
- Add class-weighted loss to handle the 7:1 fake/real imbalance
- Implement test-time augmentation (TTA)
- Add a video-streaming inference demo
- Improve the data pipeline to handle audio-visual deepfakes

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why did you prefer this one?

## Additional Context

Add any links, papers, or references that are relevant.
